query:
SELECT
                    pins.scope_key,
                    pins.name,
                    projects.slug AS project_slug,
                    pins.store_path_hash,
                    pins.store_path,
                    pins.created_at,
                    pins.updated_at
                FROM pins
                LEFT JOIN projects ON projects.id = pins.project_id
                WHERE pins.scope_key = ?
                ORDER BY pins.name ASC
